allow: PowerShell($book = Get-Content D:\\polymoney\\paper_book.json | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Bankroll: $\($book.bankroll\)"; Write-Host "Cash: $\($book.cash\)"; Write-Host "Per-trade: \(check launch args\)"; Write-Host "Seen wallets:"; $book.seen.PSObject.Properties | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.Name\)" })

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content D:\\polymoney\\wallet_progress.jsonl; $passed = $lines | ForEach-Object { $_ | ConvertFrom-Json } | Where-Object { $_.passes -eq $true } | Sort-Object composite -Descending; $wl = @\($passed | ForEach-Object { $_.wallet }\); Write-Host "Кошельков: $\($wl.Count\)"; $obj = [ordered]@{ generated = [int][double]::Parse\(\(Get-Date -UFormat %s\)\); count = $wl.Count; watchlist = $wl }; $obj | ConvertTo-Json | Out-File -FilePath D:\\polymoney\\copy_watchlist_18.json -Encoding utf8; Write-Host "Записано в copy_watchlist_18.json")

Bash(python -c "import json; b=json.load\(open\('paper_book_10k.json'\)\); print\('bankroll', b['bankroll']\); print\('cash', b['cash']\); print\('seen wallets', len\(b['seen']\)\); print\('positions', len\(b['positions']\)\); print\('n_copied', b['n_copied']\)")

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "stopping PID $_"; Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force } } else { Write-Host "нет слушателя на 5000" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count)
Bash(PYTHONUTF8=1 nohup python copy_dashboard.py --from-watchlist copy_watchlist_18.json --bankroll 100000 --per-trade 10 --interval 120 --state paper_book_10k.json)

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force; Write-Host "stopped $_" } } ; Start-Sleep 2; "listeners: " + \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count)
Bash(PYTHONUTF8=1 nohup python copy_dashboard.py --from-watchlist copy_watchlist.json --bankroll 100000 --per-trade 10 --interval 120 --state paper_book_10k.json)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('bankroll',d['bankroll'],'| copied',d['n_copied'],'| skipped',d['n_skipped'],'| open',d['n_open'],'| targets',d['status']['wallets']\)")
